mnemonics: R.A.D.A.R. - Residuals Are Diagnostics And Refinement tools
The Four Ps: Plot, Patterns, Properties, Proceed
keyPoints: Residuals should be random with no discernible patterns if the model is adequate.
Significant patterns in the ACF/PACF of residuals indicate that the model has not captured all the structure in the data.
The Ljung-Box test is a formal statistical test used to check for autocorrelation in the residuals.
commonMistakes: Ignoring patterns in residual plots and assuming the model is good enough.
Overfitting the model by adding more parameters to eliminate every minor residual correlation.
Failing to check if the residuals are normally distributed, which is an assumption for many forecasting intervals.
